01 / About

Who I Am

New Brunswick, NJ
MS CS, Rutgers 2026

I'm a Full-Stack Cloud Developer and the Co-Founder & CTO of Beunec Technologies, where I architect end-to-end AI ecosystems leveraging AWS, GCP, MongoDB, and Cloudflare to deliver products serving 1K+ users with 99.9% uptime.

Currently pursuing my Master's at Rutgers University (3.65 GPA), I thrive at the intersection of cloud infrastructure, artificial intelligence, and product engineering.

02 / Experience

Where I've Built

Beunec Technologies

Current

Co-Founder & CTO, Team Lead

May 2025 - Present
  • Architected and scaled Beunec Cloud, an AI productivity ecosystem with failover and global load balancing supporting 1K+ users with 99.9% uptime.
  • Engineered Aselius AI, a proprietary GenAI engine with ground-search and privacy-first infrastructure, end-to-end encryption, and GDPR-compliant handling.
  • Optimized platform infrastructure achieving 99.9% availability with real-time behavioral analytics via Python for resource monitoring and traffic scaling.

Dec 2025 - Jan 2026
